mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_BOARD_MANAGE WHERE (homepage_id = #{homepage_id} or homepage_id_second = #{homepage_id})

${pagingTop} SELECT * FROM ( SELECT homepage_id, manage_idx, board_name, getCodeNameToRemark('CMS', 'C0000',board_type) as board_type, board_skin, board_use_yn, add_date, category_use_yn, category1 FROM CMS_BOARD_MANAGE WHERE (homepage_id = #{homepage_id} or homepage_id_second = #{homepage_id})
) ORDER BY manage_idx DESC ${pagingBottom}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_BOARD_MANAGE WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND admin_id = #{admin_id}

${pagingTop} SELECT * FROM ( SELECT homepage_id, manage_idx, board_name, board_type, board_skin, board_use_yn, add_date FROM CMS_BOARD_MANAGE WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND admin_id = #{admin_id}
) ORDER BY manage_idx DESC ${pagingBottom}

SELECT homepage_id, manage_idx, board_name, board_type, board_skin, record_count, new_date_count, request_code, ip_use_yn, reply_use_yn, reply_list_yn, comment_use_yn, secret_use_yn, editor_use_yn, board_use_yn, add_html_use_yn, top_html, bottom_html, content_html, add_date, modify_date, view_auth, add_auth, edit_auth, delete_auth, admin_auth, admin_id, file_use_yn, file_count, file_size_total, file_ban_ext, category_use_yn, category1, category2, category3, category4, category5, rss_yn, recommend_yn, ebook_yn, charge_sms_receive_yn, write_sms_receive_yn, charge_email_receive_yn, write_email_receive_yn, board_email_send_yn, satisfy_yn, board_etc1, add_only_yn, approval_yn, push_send_yn, anonymize_yn, file_download_yn, retention_start_period, retention_end_period FROM CMS_BOARD_MANAGE WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx}
AND (homepage_id = #{homepage_id} OR homepage_id_second = #{homepage_id})
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(manage_idx),0)+1 FROM CMS_BOARD_MANAGE
INSERT INTO CMS_BOARD_MANAGE ( homepage_id, manage_idx, board_name, board_type, board_skin, record_count, new_date_count, ip_use_yn, reply_use_yn, reply_list_yn, comment_use_yn, secret_use_yn, editor_use_yn, board_use_yn, add_html_use_yn, top_html, content_html, bottom_html, add_date, modify_date, add_auth, view_auth, edit_auth, delete_auth, admin_auth, admin_id, file_use_yn, file_count, file_size_total, file_ban_ext, category_use_yn, file_download_yn, category1, category2, category3, category4, category5, rss_yn, recommend_yn, ebook_yn, charge_sms_receive_yn, write_sms_receive_yn, charge_email_receive_yn, write_email_receive_yn, board_email_send_yn, satisfy_yn, board_etc1, add_only_yn, approval_yn, push_send_yn, request_code, anonymize_yn, retention_start_period, retention_end_period ) VALUES ( #{homepage_id}, #{manage_idx}, #{board_name}, #{board_type}, #{board_type}, #{record_count}, #{new_date_count}, #{ip_use_yn}, #{reply_use_yn}, #{reply_list_yn}, #{comment_use_yn}, #{secret_use_yn}, #{editor_use_yn}, #{board_use_yn}, #{add_html_use_yn}, #{top_html}, #{content_html}, #{bottom_html}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{view_auth}, #{add_auth}, #{edit_auth}, #{delete_auth}, #{admin_auth}, #{admin_id}, #{file_use_yn}, #{file_count}, #{file_size_total}, #{file_ban_ext}, #{category_use_yn}, #{file_download_yn}, #{category1}, #{category2}, #{category3}, #{category4}, #{category5}, #{rss_yn}, #{recommend_yn}, #{ebook_yn}, #{charge_sms_receive_yn}, #{write_sms_receive_yn}, #{charge_email_receive_yn}, #{write_email_receive_yn}, #{board_email_send_yn}, #{satisfy_yn}, #{board_etc1}, #{add_only_yn}, #{approval_yn}, #{push_send_yn}, #{request_code}, #{anonymize_yn}, #{retention_start_period}, #{retention_end_period} )
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_BOARD_MANAGE SET board_name = #{board_name}, board_type = #{board_type}, board_skin = #{board_type}, record_count = #{record_count}, new_date_count = #{new_date_count}, ip_use_yn = #{ip_use_yn}, reply_use_yn = #{reply_use_yn}, reply_list_yn = #{reply_list_yn}, comment_use_yn = #{comment_use_yn}, secret_use_yn = #{secret_use_yn}, editor_use_yn = #{editor_use_yn}, board_use_yn = #{board_use_yn}, add_html_use_yn = #{add_html_use_yn}, approval_yn = #{approval_yn}, file_download_yn = #{file_download_yn}, top_html = #{top_html}, content_html = #{content_html}, bottom_html = #{bottom_html}, view_auth = #{view_auth}, add_auth = #{add_auth}, edit_auth = #{edit_auth}, delete_auth = #{delete_auth}, admin_auth = #{admin_auth}, admin_id = #{admin_id}, file_use_yn = #{file_use_yn}, file_count = #{file_count}, file_size_total = #{file_size_total}, file_ban_ext = #{file_ban_ext}, request_code = #{request_code}, category_use_yn = #{category_use_yn}, category1 = #{category1}, category2 = #{category2}, category3 = #{category3}, category4 = #{category4}, category5 = #{category5}, rss_yn = #{rss_yn}, recommend_yn = #{recommend_yn}, ebook_yn = #{ebook_yn}, charge_sms_receive_yn = #{charge_sms_receive_yn}, write_sms_receive_yn = #{write_sms_receive_yn}, charge_email_receive_yn = #{charge_email_receive_yn}, write_email_receive_yn = #{write_email_receive_yn}, board_email_send_yn = #{board_email_send_yn}, satisfy_yn = #{satisfy_yn}, board_etc1 = #{board_etc1}, add_only_yn = #{add_only_yn}, modify_date = SYSDATE, push_send_yn = #{push_send_yn}, anonymize_yn = #{anonymize_yn}, retention_start_period = #{retention_start_period}, retention_end_period = #{retention_end_period} WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND manage_idx = #{manage_idx}

UPDATE CMS_BOARD_MANAGE SET add_html_use_yn = #{add_html_use_yn}, top_html = #{top_html}, content_html = #{content_html}, bottom_html = #{bottom_html}, modify_date = SYSDATE WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND manage_idx = #{manage_idx}

UPDATE CMS_BOARD_MANAGE SET view_auth = #{view_auth}, add_auth = #{add_auth}, edit_auth = #{edit_auth}, delete_auth = #{delete_auth}, admin_auth = #{admin_auth}, modify_date = SYSDATE WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND manage_idx = #{manage_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT homepage_id, manage_idx, board_name, getCodeNameToRemark('CMS','C0000',board_type) as board_type, board_skin FROM CMS_BOARD_MANAGE WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND board_use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY manage_idx DESC

SELECT a.manage_idx, a.board_name, getCodeNameToRemark('CMS','C0000',a.board_type) as board_type, a.board_skin, b.menu_idx, a.homepage_id FROM CMS_BOARD_MANAGE a, CMS_MENU b WHERE 1=1 AND a.homepage_id = b.homepage_id AND a.manage_idx = b.manage_idx AND b.menu_type = 'BOARD' AND a.homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND a.board_type = #{board_type} AND a.manage_idx != #{manage_idx} ORDER BY a.manage_idx DESC
SELECT homepage_id FROM CMS_BOARD_MANAGE WHERE admin_id = #{admin_id}
SELECT homepage_id, manage_idx, board_name FROM CMS_BOARD_MANAGE WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND board_type = 'THEMEBOOK' AND board_use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY manage_idx DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_BOARD_MANAGE WHERE manage_idx = #{manage_idx} AND retention_end_period IS NOT NULL
